violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. It was discussed with PIC that it may also be the pressure of the dish machine. Dish machine to get serviced and tested prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 50 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Employee added more bleach to solution until it was at 50ppm. Sanitizer to be tested before use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the dry storage area (Across from mop sink room) have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Dish machine to get serviced. Establishment to use 3-bay sink until equipment is repaired and tested. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
